subject: Invitation to visit Shanghai on April 2
body: Hello, we are your VIP client Dingxin Software. We would like to invite you to our Shanghai office on April 2 to discuss our cooperation plan for the second half of the year. This meeting is very important to us, please make sure to attend. Contact: Manager Chen at the Shanghai office.

subject: Shenzhen Tech Exchange 4/2-4/3
body: Hi team, the Shenzhen branch is planning a technical exchange event from April 2 to 3, focusing on microservice architecture upgrade. HQ colleagues are welcome to attend. Contact: Li Wei at the Shenzhen office.

subject: Beijing HQ Annual Meeting April 5
body: Company-wide notice: The annual strategy meeting will be held at Beijing HQ on April 5. All department heads must attend. Round-trip flights have been booked for all regional colleagues, please confirm your itinerary.

subject: Weekly report reminder
body: Please submit your weekly report before end of business Friday.

subject: Weekend dinner
body: Team dinner this weekend, are you coming?
